Package org.passay

Class DefaultPasswordValidator

java.lang.Object
org.passay.DefaultPasswordValidator
All Implemented Interfaces:
PasswordValidator
public class DefaultPasswordValidator extends Object implements PasswordValidator
Default implementation for evaluating multiple password rules against a candidate password. Supports a fail fast flag to indicate that rule validation should stop if any rule fails.

  • Field Summary

  • Field Details

    • DEFAULT_ENTROPY_PROVIDER

      public static final BiFunction<List<? extends Rule>,PasswordData,Entropy> DEFAULT_ENTROPY_PROVIDER
      Calculates the entropy of the given PasswordData based on the password rules specified. It's important to note that this function does NOT take into account IllegalRegexRule or AllowedRegexRule as the regular expressions driving the rules may be negative matches. The supplied password data must have an origin of Origin.Generated or Origin.User.
      See Also:
      • PDF Publication

    • NULL_MESSAGE_RESOLVER

      public static final MessageResolver NULL_MESSAGE_RESOLVER
      Message resolver that returns null for any rule result detail.

    • NO_ENTROPY_PROVIDER

      public static final BiFunction<List<? extends Rule>,PasswordData,Entropy> NO_ENTROPY_PROVIDER
      Entropy provider that returns -1.

    • passwordRules

      private final List<Rule> passwordRules
      Password rules.

    • failFast

      private final boolean failFast
      Whether password validation should fail fast.

    • messageResolver

      private final MessageResolver messageResolver
      Message resolver.

    • entropyProvider

      private final BiFunction<List<? extends Rule>,PasswordData,Entropy> entropyProvider
      Entropy provider.
